summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureImage Forge P1 features: SLSA Level 3/4 provenance generation, VEX document generation, and Webhook ChatOps integration. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Webhooks page, SLSA tab, and VEX tab.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was calling wrong method (send_event instead of send_event_async)

critical_code_review_comments: SLSA signing uses HMAC simulation instead of Sigstore (MOCKED) - production should use Sigstore/Cosign
Webhook HTTP delivery is simulated (logged but not actually sent to external endpoints) - MOCKED
Rekor transparency log integration is simulated - MOCKED
VEX exploitability analysis uses rule-based heuristics, not actual runtime analysis
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed test_webhook endpoint to use send_event_async
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Created test webhooks with TEST_P1_ prefix during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working. Backend endpoints tested: GET /api/slsa/levels, GET /api/builds/{id}/slsa, POST /api/builds/{id}/slsa/verify, GET /api/vex/formats, GET /api/builds/{id}/vex, GET /api/builds/{id}/vex/summary, GET /api/webhooks, POST /api/webhooks, DELETE /api/webhooks/{id}, POST /api/webhooks/{id}/test, GET /api/webhooks/events, GET /api/webhooks/destinations, GET /api/webhooks/delivery-history. Frontend tested: Dashboard with Webhooks nav link, Webhooks page with stats/list/delivery history/create modal, Build Detail page with SLSA tab (provenance verification, compliance checklist, download buttons) and VEX tab (exploitability analysis summary, false positive rate, vulnerability statements).

slsa_attestation.get_slsa_levels: PASS - returns 4 SLSA levels with requirements
slsa_attestation.generate_slsa_attestation: PASS - generates in-toto v1 format provenance
slsa_attestation.verify_slsa_provenance: PASS - verifies provenance with trust score
slsa_attestation.ui_slsa_tab: PASS - shows verification status, compliance checklist, download buttons

vex_documents.get_vex_formats: PASS - returns openvex and csaf formats
vex_documents.generate_vex_document: PASS - generates OpenVEX with exploitability analysis
vex_documents.get_vex_summary: PASS - returns executive summary with false positive rate
vex_documents.ui_vex_tab: PASS - shows exploitability analysis, risk reduction, vulnerability statements

webhooks.get_webhook_events: PASS - returns 17 event types including slsa.attestation_generated, vex.document_generated
webhooks.get_webhook_destinations: PASS - returns slack, microsoft_teams, discord, generic_webhook
webhooks.list_webhooks: PASS - returns webhooks list with stats
webhooks.create_webhook: PASS - creates webhook with events subscription
webhooks.ui_webhooks_page: PASS - shows stats, webhooks list, delivery history
webhooks.ui_create_modal: PASS - modal with name, destination, url, events, channel fields

mocked_services_note: SLSA signing uses HMAC simulation (not Sigstore). Webhook HTTP delivery is logged but not actually sent. Rekor transparency log is simulated. VEX analysis uses rule-based heuristics.
